parameters.name: jql
parameters.value: project = KAN AND issuetype in (Task, Bug, Story) AND status != Done ORDER BY updated DESC

parameters.content:
📊 WF-1.4 — Estatus Diarios QA

Dispara a las 6pm (lun-vie)
Consulta Jira KAN: Task + Bug + Story
Envía email con tabla HTML por tipo
Campos: Work, Assignee, Priority, Status, Resolution, Updated

⚠️ Requiere email-server.js corriendo en localhost:3025
